LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CGC-16-553608 AND CGC-17-557518 FOR ALL PURPOSES IS GRANTED. USF HAS A STATUTORY RIGHT TO CONSOLIDATE THESE TWO ACTIONS. (SEE LABOR CODE SEC. 3853.) CASES CGC-16-553608 AND CGC-17-557518 ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES. THE COURT DESIGNATES CGC-16-553608 AS THE LEAD CASE AND ITS TRIAL DATE OF AUGUST 28, 2017 REMAINS INTACT. (SEE CRC 3.350(B).) THE COURT REJECTS MR. RAMOS' CLAIMS OF PREJUDICE. THE TRIAL DATE CONTINUES TO BE AUGUST 28, 2017 AND USF CORRECTLY NOTES THAT APPROPRIATE JURY INSTRUCTIONS CAN AVOID ANY ALLEGED JUROR CONFUSION BASED ON THE INTERPLAY OF A TORT ACTION AND THE WORKER'S COMPENSATION SYSTEM. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ANGELA BRADSTREET; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D302)
PARTIES/ATTORNEYS FROM CONSOLIDATED CASE # CGC-17-557518 ADDED TO LEAD CASE # CGC-16-553608 FOR MAILING OF COURT NOTICES.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2017 Continued To Sep-20-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-553608 WITH CASE CGC-17-557518
Off Calendar Aug-03-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CGC-16-553608 and CGC-17-557518 for all purposes is GRANTED. USF has a statutory right to consolidate these two actions. (See Labor Code sec. 3853.) Cases CGC-16-553608 and CGC-17-557518 are consolidated for all purposes. The court designates CGC-16-553608 as the lead case and its trial date of August 28, 2017 remains intact. (See CRC 3.350(b).) The court rejects Mr. Ramos' claims of prejudice. The trial date continues to be August 28, 2017 and USF correctly notes that appropriate jury instructions can avoid any alleged juror confusion based on the interplay of a tort action and the worker's compensation system. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Angela Bradstreet; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not REported. (D302)
